narrative:
Precinct New Phila 2-B (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 711 registered voters, with 47.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.3 percentage points.
